# Dreamz Automation Systems

> Siemens Authorized System House in Ghaziabad, India, delivering end-to-end industrial automation — DCS, PLC, SCADA, machine automation and IT-OT convergence. Operating since 2005.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Company overview, capabilities, featured case studies, and founders.
- [About](/about): Company story, timeline, founders' pedigree, facility, and certifications.
- [Solutions](/solutions): Three pillars — process industry automation, machine-level motion, and customised training kits.
- [Industries](/industries): Verticals served — petrochemicals, BOPP/converting, automotive, food, transportation, water, and education.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Selected work across DCS, PLC, SCADA, and machine automation projects.
- [Insights](/insights): Technical, market, and founder commentary on automation and digitalization.

## Optional

- [IOCL Mathura case study](/case-studies/iocl-mathura): S5 → S7-400H Hot-Standby migration with WinCC V7.
- [DMRC Metro Line 3 case study](/case-studies/dmrc-metro-line-3): Metro automation project.
